Milton, three of the pendants arrived defective. The clasps are faulty and one stone is loose.
Claire, thank you for telling me. Let me apologize for the inconvenience, that should never reach you.
The collection goes on display this weekend. I cannot have a delay.
Understood. If you send the faulty pieces back today, we will ship the replacements on Wednesday.
And if they are late again?
If anything slips, I will call you the moment I know, and to make up for the trouble, we would cover the express freight. I will resolve this.
If you log the complaint today, we will resolve it before the weekend.

If I were you, I would wait for the replacement.
You have my word: I will resolve this today.

Hello, this message is for Milton Sayegh. This is Claire Donovan from Halstead Fine Jewelry in New York. I am calling about order number four-seven-two, the diamond pendants that arrived this morning. I am afraid we have a problem. Three of the twelve pieces are defective, the clasps are faulty and will not close, and one stone is loose. This is a real inconvenience because the collection goes on display this weekend. I would appreciate a call back today so we can resolve this quickly. If the replacements can ship by Wednesday, we can still make the opening. If not, we will need to talk about compensation. Please call me back as soon as you can. Thank you, Milton. Goodbye.

Hi Milton, it is Paulo from the workshop, returning your call about the Halstead order. I have looked into the three defective pendants. You are right, the clasps came from a bad batch we received last month, and we have already pulled the rest of that batch from production. Here is where we are. If you approve the replacements right now, we can finish them tonight and ship first thing tomorrow morning, which means New York has them by Wednesday. I would not promise that if I were not sure. If anything slips, I will call you immediately, not the day before. And to make up for the trouble, I would suggest we cover the express freight ourselves. Let me know and I will start the work. Talk soon.
